objectives: Administer users, permissions, services, and networking on Linux systems
Apply core engineering principles to improve system reliability and maintainability
Standardize routine operational tasks using engineering processes
learning_path.title: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations

objectives: Write Python scripts to automate common operational workflows
Implement repeatable checks and simple remediation routines to reduce manual effort
Apply engineering principles to produce readable, testable automation
prerequisites: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations
learning_path.title: Scripting (Python) for Operational Automation

objectives: Define key service health indicators and visualize them in Grafana
Configure Prometheus scraping and basic alerting aligned to operational goals
Use engineering processes to document dashboards and alert intent
prerequisites: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations
learning_path.title: Monitoring And Observability (Prometheus/Grafana) Essentials

objectives: Ingest, search, and analyze logs to support rapid diagnosis
Create log views that align with incident investigation workflows
Apply engineering processes to standardize log fields and retention expectations
prerequisites: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations
learning_path.title: Logging And Log Management (Elk/Opensearch) for Troubleshooting

objectives: Run structured incident response from detection through mitigation and recovery
Use monitoring and logging signals to guide triage and escalation decisions
Apply engineering processes for post-incident follow-up and continuous improvement
prerequisites: Logging And Log Management (Elk/Opensearch) for Troubleshooting
learning_path.title: Incident Response And On-Call Operations: Triage to Resolution

objectives: Operate core cloud resources with an emphasis on reliability and repeatability
Apply cost management practices to control spend and reduce waste
Use engineering principles to make tradeoffs between reliability, performance, and cost
prerequisites: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms (Aws/Gcp/Azure) Operations and Governance Basics

objectives: Model infrastructure changes using Terraform workflows
Reduce configuration drift by managing infrastructure declaratively
Apply engineering processes for review, rollout, and rollback of infrastructure changes
prerequisites: Cloud Platforms (Aws/Gcp/Azure) Operations and Governance Basics
learning_path.title: Infrastructure As Code (Terraform) for Repeatable Environments

objectives: Automate system configuration to ensure consistency across environments
Implement idempotent configuration changes and controlled rollouts
Use engineering processes to manage configuration baselines and change tracking
prerequisites: Linux Systems Administration Foundations for Reliable Operations
learning_path.title: Configuration Management (Ansible/Chef/Puppet) for Standardized Systems

objectives: Design CI/CD pipelines that enforce repeatable build and deployment steps
Integrate quality gates aligned with engineering principles and engineering processes
Reduce deployment risk through controlled promotion and rollback patterns
learning_path.title: Ci/Cd Pipelines (Jenkins/Github Actions) for Reliable Delivery

objectives: Operate Kubernetes workloads and understand core cluster components
Use monitoring and logging to observe Kubernetes services and troubleshoot issues
Apply engineering principles to design resilient deployment patterns
prerequisites: Logging And Log Management (Elk/Opensearch) for Troubleshooting
learning_path.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals for Platform Operations

objectives: Apply six sigma methods to identify and reduce operational variation
Define measurable outcomes and track improvements using engineering processes
Prioritize improvements based on impact, effort, and cost management considerations
prerequisites: Incident Response And On-Call Operations: Triage to Resolution
learning_path.title: Operational Excellence with six sigma methods

objectives: Design predictive maintenance signals from time-series trends and alert patterns
Use engineering principles to define thresholds, baselines, and maintenance triggers
Integrate predictive maintenance routines into incident response and on-call operations
prerequisites: Incident Response And On-Call Operations: Triage to Resolution
learning_path.title: Predictive maintenance using Monitoring And Observability (Prometheus/Grafana)

matched_occupation.description: Dependability engineers ensure the reliability, availability and maintainability (RAM) of a production process or a system. They focus on improving the capability to function without interruption and operate when needed, and on increasing the easiness of repairing, replacing or upgrading the product.
matched_occupation.label: dependability engineer
